definition: The collective designation for the eight-factor noble path of practice.
notes: This record names the whole path as one governed doctrinal unit. It should point readers back to the eight individual same-factor entries rather than flattening them into a single slogan or replacing the more detailed headword records that control translation policy.

example_phrases.notes: Canonical collective label for the governed path-factor family.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use this as the standard collective label for the eight-factor path when the whole ariya-atthangika-magga expression is present.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not replace the collective label with slogan-like paraphrase or treat it as a substitute for the governed same-factor entries when the passage is actually unpacking the path.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the collective path label from drifting away from the repository's governed same-factor family.
